prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This report is focused on data gathered from participants across Great Britain, which includes only England and Wales. Scotland has separate legal and governmental frameworks, and thus this report may not accurately reflect the public attitudes and experiences particular to Scotland.
